creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
Created attachment 193450
fstrm - patch with better patching

Hi,

Yesterday I tried the patch, but ran into af_inet6 troubles, so today I renewed my testing env.

What I also noticed was -when running the patch- was two patches files were created, but didn't end up in devel/fstrm/files. Might be I'm doing something incorrect.
So I recreate these modifications using `make makepatch` to have that solved.

Worked all fine in poudriere, in 10.4 and 11.1, and both amd64 as i386.

Thanks for your work.

Leo.
